title: Improve page load performance: optimize FCP and LCP

requirements.text: In `frontend/index.html`, add `<link rel='preconnect' href='https://fonts.googleapis.com' />` and `<link rel='preconnect' href='https://fonts.gstatic.com' crossorigin />` before the Google Fonts `<link>` stylesheet tag. Additionally, convert the Google Fonts `<link rel='stylesheet'>` to use `media='print' onload="this.media='all'"` for non-blocking font loading, and add a `<noscript>` fallback. This eliminates render-blocking font requests that delay First Contentful Paint.
acceptanceCriteria: Google Fonts stylesheet is loaded asynchronously and does not block rendering
preconnect hints for fonts.googleapis.com and fonts.gstatic.com are present in <head> before the fonts link
A <noscript> fallback link for the fonts stylesheet is present

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx`, add `loading='eager'` and `fetchpriority='high'` attributes to the hero background `` element (or equivalent inline style background). If the hero image is rendered as a CSS background-image, convert it to an `` tag positioned absolutely behind the content so it can receive these priority hints. This ensures the hero image — the Largest Contentful Paint element — is fetched with highest priority.
acceptanceCriteria: The hero background image is loaded eagerly with high fetch priority
The LCP image is not lazy-loaded
The hero section visual appearance is unchanged

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/components/Services.tsx`, add `loading='lazy'` to all six service card `` elements so that off-screen images are not downloaded during initial page load. All other images below the fold in `About.tsx`, `Testimonials.tsx`, and `Footer.tsx` should also receive `loading='lazy'` if not already set. Only the hero image (above the fold) must remain eager.
acceptanceCriteria: All service card images have loading='lazy'
No below-the-fold images trigger network requests on initial load
Hero image remains loading='eager' with fetchpriority='high'

requirements.text: In `frontend/index.html`, add a `<link rel='preload' as='image' href='/assets/generated/[hero-image-filename]' />` tag inside `<head>` to preload the hero/LCP image. Use the exact filename of the hero background image currently referenced in `Hero.tsx`. This tells the browser to start fetching the hero image as soon as the HTML is parsed, before CSS and JS are processed.
acceptanceCriteria: A <link rel='preload' as='image'> tag for the hero image is present in <head>
The href matches the actual hero image path used in Hero.tsx
The preload tag appears early in <head>, before render-blocking resources

requirements.text: In `frontend/index.html`, inline the critical above-the-fold CSS (font-face declarations, hero section base styles, navigation styles, and color custom properties from `index.css`) directly in a `<style>` tag inside `<head>`. Extract only the styles needed to render the visible viewport without waiting for the external CSS bundle. This reduces render-blocking time and improves First Contentful Paint.
acceptanceCriteria: Critical CSS for hero and navigation is inlined in a <style> block in <head>
The page renders its above-the-fold content without waiting for the full CSS bundle
No visual regression — all sections still appear correctly styled

requirements.text: In `frontend/index.html`, add `<meta http-equiv='Cache-Control' content='max-age=31536000, immutable' />` for static assets and ensure the `<html>` tag has `lang='fr'` set (if not already). Also add a DNS prefetch hint `<link rel='dns-prefetch' href='https://fonts.googleapis.com' />` to speed up DNS resolution for external font resources.
acceptanceCriteria: A dns-prefetch hint for fonts.googleapis.com is present in <head>
No existing meta tags are removed or broken

constraints: Do not remove or modify the Google site verification meta tags, canonical tag, Open Graph tags, or JSON-LD structured data in index.html
Do not alter the visual design, layout, or French content of any section
Do not remove the Google Search Console verification file frontend/public/google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde.html
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Server-side rendering or static site generation
Image format conversion (WebP/AVIF) via build tooling — only HTML attribute and loading strategy changes
Backend changes — the Motoko actor has no role in page load performance
Changes to SEO content, testimonials, structured data, or any existing feature outside of performance
